title: Nephrolepis Boston Fern - Sword Fern - Indoor Houseplant for Home or Office - Potted Ferns, Ideal Air Purifying Plant for Small and Large Spaces - Bright Green Foliage Leaves (50-60cm Incl. Pot)
features: Common Name: Boston Fern or Sword Fern

Characteristics: Nephrolepis Boston is a member of the Fern family of plants. It is well known as one of the most popular air-purifying houseplants around, with many plant-lovers wanting to get their hands on one. It is recommended to keep it in partial shade or in a humid environment, potted.

Plant Advice: Keeping the soil of the Boston Fern moist when watering is essential in its growth. If the plant is situated in a dry area you should mist the Fern instead. An all-purpose general fertiliser will suffice when feeding the Boston Fern – once every few months is sufficient.
*Images are for illustrative purposes only. Plant supplied in a growers pot, decorative pot not included.
